greeting.speaker: tavern_keep
greeting.text: Traveler! You look like you've been on the road a while. Rest a spell?

ask_rumors.speaker: tavern_keep
ask_rumors.text: The old ruins up the forest path — folks say a relic's been stirring again.

first_meeting.speaker: mountain_sage
first_meeting.text: Three paths. Each ends in a truth you cannot unknow.

path_light.speaker: mountain_sage
path_light.text: Seek the shrine at river's edge.

path_shadow.speaker: mountain_sage
path_shadow.text: The ruins hold what you must face.

path_silence.speaker: mountain_sage
path_silence.text: Walk home. Some stories end unwritten.

light_ending.epilogue: Dawn broke over still water; the relic slept.

shadow_ending.epilogue: The ruins spoke in a voice you now carry.

silence_ending.epilogue: You walked home. The wind did not follow.
